resolveSet-api.signature: resolveSet(input: string, cwd: string, state?: ProjectState): { resolvedId: string, numericIndex: number, wasNumeric: boolean }
resolveSet-api.description: Updated resolveSet function that resolves numeric indices against the current milestone's sets array in STATE.json (not filesystem directories). Optional state parameter avoids re-reading STATE.json when the caller already has it.

resolveWave-api.signature: resolveWave(input: string, state: object, cwd: string, setId?: string): { setId: string, waveId: string, setIndex: number, waveIndex: number, wasNumeric: boolean }
resolveWave-api.description: resolveWave updated to use STATE.json-based set resolution internally (calls updated resolveSet).

archive-resilient-resolution.description: Numeric set index N resolves to the Nth set in the current milestone's sets array (1-based), regardless of whether .planning/sets/ directories have been archived or reordered. The filesystem is not consulted for index resolution.

backward-compatible-string-ids.description: String set IDs (e.g., 'state-consistency') continue to resolve by exact match against milestone sets. Behavior is unchanged for string inputs.
